---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for Fylix
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when...")

## Proposed solution

A clear, concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Affected area

- [ ] Backend / API (`backend/app`)
- [ ] Public upload portal (`frontend/`)
- [ ] Admin dashboard (`admin-frontend/`)
- [ ] Crypto / envelope encryption (`backend/app/crypto`)
- [ ] Deployment / Docker / Kubernetes
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references (e.g. links to relevant `docs/*.md` sections) here.
